title: antirrhinum pyramidatum
intro: Antirrhinum pyramidatum, also known as the pyramidal snapdragon, is a flowering plant species within the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Antirrhinum pyramidatum include its ability to relieve bronchitis and other respiratory tract infections, and its antiseptic properties may also help to soothe skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, although its efficacy and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before use.
